description: I enjoyed my overall experience and was very cost efficient
author: Ayanda M.
pros: I found this software very easy to use and made onboarding so easy as I was able to add employees easily.
cons: WorkforceHub does not have a good customer service helpline, they take too long to respond.

description: In general, I've heard fewer issues so it would seem that things are going much better that I'm aware.
author: Richard T.
pros: The fact that this is saved in the cloud and therefore a little less stress on myself to have a local backup of the system.
cons: Compared to our prior timeclocks with Icon Time, not as flexible when a fingerprint doesn't go through, as the old system we had, you could bypass the fingerprint and at least have a picture taken to verify identify. This does not.

review_title: Hard to work with - don't recommend
description: very confusing and aggravating, I would not recommend this
author: Ashley R.
pros: It did the job to allow me to access email from another company, but that was it
cons: almost everything. it was very hard to connect to. It kept saying my computer had issues and would run me into circles when trying to log in. It acted as if I needed to download something but when I did, didn't seem to recognize that step was completed

description: WorkforceHub has been our solution to HR, Time-tracking and onboarding for a couple of years now. I don't see us moving away from it anytime soon
author: Aaron Y.
pros: The multi-function capability of the platform is very useful. From HR to onboarding to time-tracking and time off requests and even team member check in
cons: Some integration issues with Quickbooks but it isn't a huge issue. Usually easily fixed

description: It’s the not the best, needs help with updates.
author: Louise D.
pros: When team gets work, they can accept, easy.
cons: When doing changes in the app for employees to accept the new changes it’s harder.

description: So far it is ok but things are still confusing for us and still trying to work out the kinks.
author: Christina S.
pros: That is it has PTO and time tracking in one system vs using multiple systems
cons: 1) That we are not able to have a free admin accounts for multiple admins. 2) The training would be more applicable if we were able to access the system and trial things during the instruction; it was very confusing trying to set things up on our own after. 3) Steps to download and send to accounting is confusing and we thought it would be easy since our accoutant has accountants world but did not work since we were not able to access and change information (addresses, etc). 4) Wish things were more visually appealing and employee time tracking and time off were in one area instead of seperate places; as well as a different place to make additions to PTO etc.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall experience has been god using this system. I would enjoy it more if it had a more modern look. Providing a face lift to the pages and easier navigation while using. It tends to be a learning curve when working with our new employees.
author: N'dea M.
pros: What I like about WorkforceHub is that our managers are able to prepopulate workers schedules and change them as needed. We are also able to view time off and where coverage is needed in one location. For our employee they are able to adjust hours, make time off request, and view PTO balances for more effective request.
cons: I am not in favor of the system not displaying what hours will be allotted during the next cycle. For our organization, pto accruals occur every pay cycle. It would be nice to either see what the new balance will be with added time or what the balance will look like if time was taken.

description: Overall it's a great tool that can help payroll department to provide better service with tracking employees hours.
author: Luka T.
pros: I love the fact that I can easily integrate with payroll software and track employee hours plus it's mobile friendly.
cons: Implementation process takes too long which it creates clients disappointment and often changing their mind to not move forward.

review_title: Good for Managing Teams and Scheduling
author: Elias S.
pros: I appreciate how WorkforceHub centralizes scheduling, time tracking, and employee management, saving a lot of admin time.
cons: The system can lag when multiple users log in, and the design feels a bit outdated compared to modern platforms. That also makes the learning curve a little bit higher.

description: Great to work with. Has helped ourHR department in a big way.
author: Eddie W.
pros: Great for employee scheduling. Definitely gets the job done.
cons: Could be a little more user friendly for personnel.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Grateful for such an intuitive program and amazing team!
description: Their team has been most helpful in getting us started and supporting us while using the program.
author: Martha W.
pros: The ease of use, how it syncs with our payroll company, the easy to use reports, and date tracking for accounting purposes. We use it for onboarding new staff, time sheets and scheduling.
cons: I have not found anything negative about this program.
author_profession: CEO and Licensed Marriage and Family Therapist

description: My overall experience is a wonderful experience. WorkForceHub is easy to use and easy to navigate. Their staff is very helpful as well.
author: Tina P.
pros: Being able to set schedules for employees.
cons: Not being able to add mileage until the employee clocks out.

description: Good. Kept accurate pto and weekly hours. Nice platform.
author: Kelly M.
pros: Extremely easy to use. The dashboard has a nice setup.
cons: The login and logout buttons are to close

description: Pretty good. I would request ot loads faster.
author: Emma A.
pros: How easy it is to use. It is easy to view pay stubs and get t4 forms for taxes.
cons: Sometimes it does lack customization options. Uaually it is pretty good for making basic schedules. One the mobile app there are not as many features as the laptop version.

author: Yadira J.
pros: I love that it is really user friendly. Everything is pretty straight forward.
cons: Sometimes I think it glitches so I think I've clocked in but haven't. But I think that is more likely my computer that is glitching

description: Software is easy to use, employees were receptive to trying it as well.
author: Carrie P.
pros: I have found that Workforce Hub has been very user friendly and customer support has been very helpful.
cons: Although customer support is helpful, there are times we have to wait too long, especially when needing something answered right away.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very good. I love WorkforceHub. I have used it at a few of the companies I have worked for.
author: Steven B.
pros: Makes keeping track of time simple and effective
cons: Nothing. It is a really great tool and makes the job much easier

author: Shatema R.
pros: It provided me with Consistency and reliability
cons: It was hard to navigated at first but once I figured it out it became easier

description: I have great experience working with this software. I have small business in small city so it is perfect for my small growing business.
author: Kinjal V.
pros: Time and schedule option Ideal for small business. You can easily track on all progress regarding individual employees.
cons: In earlier stages only current need address. You have go on deep to get fully access of the all characteristic of the app.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Helps Supervisors with great performance with employees scheduling, clockin in and out, and is a good interview and hiring hub.
author: Tonji W.
pros: It keeps track of everything in one place , makes it easy and simple and organized
cons: Nothing , the system is very well though through and put together

description: Overall our experience with WorkforceHub has been positive
author: Donovan V.
pros: I like the ability to capture all sorts of documents here
cons: It can be a little difficult to use at first before you can get the hang of it
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: So far great! I enjoy the ability to make changes and not always rely on a third party's team to update quick employee changes.
author: Jared W.
pros: I like having the ability to run various reports. Other Payroll platforms gave me limited types of reports I can run and that makes it harder for a business owner to truly analyze all aspects of their team's cost.
cons: There is a learning curve and it takes time to know where to find reports as well as how to read some of the reports. Although WorkforceHub has a good team to help address my questions in a timely manner.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Keep up the great work!! Love the product.
author: Tina K.
pros: It's very easy to use on the most part. Really like the Applicant Stack that will roll over into Swipeclock when a person is hired. The Workforce Hub team does answer me back on a timely basis.
cons: It doesn't do somethings that my current software does but they are checking into it to see if it is doable.

description: It has been a nice program to use. It was an adjustment for everyone in the beginning, but it has worked out nicely for what we were looking for.
author: Voner S.
pros: Employees clocking in and not having to use paper timecards and to see their vacation/PTO hours they have remaining to use. Also, the support team is so helpful and very good about getting any issues resolved. I appreciate that for sure!!
cons: It can be spotty at times depending on the location when employees try to clock in or out and it won't let them.

description: My on boarding was not the most competent start. I felt like we were figuring it out together rather than shown how it works. I had questions a few months after onboarding and received no response. Overall it does exactly what they say it will do! There were no broken promises or misleading sales tactics. Product is easy to use and we have not experienced any technical issues. Great time tracking system
author: Elizabeth J.
pros: Straight forward and easy to use. Meets the needs we were looking for to track time.
cons: Finding my billing/payment location was not easy.
